words.def: a shoulder firearm with a long barrel and a rifled bore
the event of something burning (often destructive)
words.zh: n. 火, 爐火, 電爐, 火災, 閃光體, 炮火, 熱情

words.def: a characteristic state or mode of living
words.zh: n. 生活, 生命, 人生, 世事, 生物, 壽命, 一生, 生命力, 靈魂, 無期徒刑

words.def: a set of related records (either written or electronic) kept together
words.zh: n. 檔案, 公文箱, 資料夾, 檔案, 卷宗, 銼刀

words.def: a statement that deviates from or perverts the truth
words.zh: n. 謊言, 假象, 位置
